mapper.select: SELECT id, execute_mode, run_time, apply_data_source, config_json, status, cron_expression FROM clean_rule_config WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = #{tableName} AND column_name != 'id'
SELECT * FROM clean_rule_config WHERE execute_mode = 'SCHEDULED' AND status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO clean_interaction_result (source_id, task_id, config_id, raw_content, clean_content, status_label, clean_time) VALUES
( #{item.sourceId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.configId}, #{item.rawContent}, #{item.cleanContent}, #{item.statusLabel}, #{item.cleanTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, evaluation_text FROM t_interaction_history WHERE evaluation_text IS NOT NULL AND evaluation_text != ''
